serialPort.label: Serial port
serialPort.help: Path to the USB-UART device. Use a stable /dev/serial/by-id/... path to avoid surprises when other USB serial devices are present.
serialPort.validatorErrorText: A serial port path is required.

hostAddress.label: Host address (decimal)
hostAddress.help: DALY upper-computer host byte. 64 (0x40) is the default; some BMS firmwares accept 128 (0x80).

allowMosfetWrites.label: Enable charge/discharge MOSFET writes (DANGEROUS)
allowMosfetWrites.help: When enabled, writes to control.chargeMosfet and control.dischargeMosfet are sent to the BMS. Disabling a MOSFET disconnects the battery from the load or charger; only enable this if you understand the consequences for your installation.
